title: Auth, Projects & Analytics Core
summary: This release establishes Vyzora as a functional end-to-end analytics platform. It introduces secure GitHub authentication, self-serve project management, and a high-performance DB-backed metrics pipeline.

whatsIncluded.headline: GitHub OAuth & Secure Sessions
whatsIncluded.detail: Implemented professional-grade authentication using GitHub OAuth and HttpOnly JWT cookies for tamper-proof session management.

whatsIncluded.headline: Project Management & Rate Limiting
whatsIncluded.detail: Users can now create, list, and delete projects directly from the dashboard, protected by per-user ceilings and hourly rate limits.

whatsIncluded.headline: Optimized Analytics Pipeline
whatsIncluded.detail: Replaced in-memory data processing with raw SQL aggregation and composite indexing, enabling fast sub-second metrics in the dashboard.

whatsIncluded.headline: Fully Wired Dashboard
whatsIncluded.detail: The dashboard is now 100% connected to the backend, displaying real-time events, unique visitors, and session counts from the database.

title: SaaS Landing Page & Docs
summary: Transformed Vyzora from a backend-only engine into a complete SaaS product with a premium landing page, reactive documentation, and a cohesive design system.

whatsIncluded.headline: Responsive SaaS Landing Page
whatsIncluded.detail: Implemented a high-conversion hero section, interactive feature cards, and architectural pipeline visualization. Powered by a custom particle background system.

whatsIncluded.headline: Dynamic Sticky Navbar
whatsIncluded.detail: Built a scroll-reactive navigation system that transitions from floating to fixed with backdrop-blur, subtle borders, and shadow depth.

whatsIncluded.headline: Developer Documentation System
whatsIncluded.detail: Created a dedicated docs layout with a sticky sidebar, anchor-based navigation, and comprehensive guides for SDK usage and API reference.

whatsIncluded.headline: Design System & Utilities
whatsIncluded.detail: Established a dark-theme design system using Tailwind 4, featuring indigo/purple gradients, glassmorphism, and responsive container layouts.

title: Core Ingestion Layer
summary: Built the full event ingestion pipeline from SDK to database. Every event is validated, batched, and written to Supabase Postgres with composite indexing for fast time-range queries.

whatsIncluded.headline: PostgreSQL schema — User, Project, Event
whatsIncluded.detail: Three relational models with UUID primary keys, VarChar constraints, and cascade deletes. Composite index on (projectId, createdAt) for time-range analytics.

whatsIncluded.headline: Secure API key generation
whatsIncluded.detail: 64-character hex keys generated with crypto.randomBytes(32). Each project gets a unique key — invalid keys are rejected before hitting the database.

whatsIncluded.headline: Bulk ingest with createMany
whatsIncluded.detail: Events are batched and written in a single Prisma createMany call. A 1mb body guard prevents oversized payloads.

whatsIncluded.headline: Strict Zod validation
whatsIncluded.detail: Every field length matches the DB schema: sessionId/visitorId ≤128, eventType ≤64, path ≤512. Validation errors return structured 400 responses.

title: Project Scaffold
summary: Initialised the Vyzora monorepo with separate workspaces for the backend API, Next.js dashboard, and TypeScript runtime SDK. Established the base configuration for all three packages.

whatsIncluded.headline: Backend scaffold — Express + Prisma
whatsIncluded.detail: Node.js 18 + TypeScript server with route, controller, service, and config layers. Prisma configured for PostgreSQL with a prisma.config.ts entry point.

whatsIncluded.headline: Frontend scaffold — Next.js 15
whatsIncluded.detail: App Router with dark theme Tailwind config, route stubs for /dashboard and /login, and globals.css design tokens.

whatsIncluded.headline: Runtime SDK scaffold
whatsIncluded.detail: TypeScript package with tsup for ESM + CJS dual output. Modules: tracker.ts, session.ts, batch.ts.

whatsIncluded.headline: Documentation stubs
whatsIncluded.detail: architecture.md, api-spec.md, and sdk-design.md in the /docs workspace.
